mapper.select: /* wms-inbound-ibordermaganer-sql-oracle.xml - selectIbDtInfoList - 입고 상세 정보 List */ SELECT CTKEY , OWKEY , IBHDKEY , IBDTKEY , IBDTKEY AS DTKEY , UPRIBDTKEY , ORGRIICYN , ICKEY , SBKEY , ICUNITKEY , INITQTY , EXPCTQTY , IBQTY , CNFRMQTY , DMGQTY , FOODDMGQTY , DFCQTY , DONAQTY , COALESCE(IBQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DMGQTY, 0) + COALESCE(FOODDMGQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DFCQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DONAQTY, 0) AS QTY /* 수량(반품입고수량) */ , IBQTY AS AVQTY /* 가용(예정)수량 */ , COALESCE(DMGQTY, 0) + COALESCE(FOODDMGQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DFCQTY, 0) + COALESCE(DONAQTY, 0) AS NAVQTY /* 불용수량 */ , NONQTY , DSPSQTY , RJQTY , UOM , CPAMT , PRDCTDATE , EXPDATE , ORHDKEY , ORDTKEY , EXTORDERKEY , EXPORDERLINENO , SLPRCAMT , IBNISRSNCD , IBNISDTRSNCONT , CLAIMSNDYN , CLAIMRSNCONT , ORGCHITNO , ORGCHITSEQNO , ORGCHITDATE , ACKEY , ICTMPRDIVCD , DCKEY , ILBHSKEY , IBCNFRMPRCSDATE , IBCNFRMURKEY , IBDDLNDATE , IBDDLNURKEY , UPDATEKEY , WKCHNLCD , IBDTSTATUSCD , WEIGHT , PLCMSTATUSCD , ASRTMASICKEY , ASRTWKTGTYN , ASRTWKCOMPLYN , ASRTWKQTY , DLVRYCORPCD , WBLNO , RETSHIPDLVRYCORPCD , RETSHIPWBLNO , FILEKEY , RIDMGRSNCD , RIDFCRSNCONT , RIPRGRSTATUSCD , RIHOLDABLEQTY , RIHOLDIMPSQTY , RIHOLDRSNCD , RIHOLDDTRSNCD , RIHOLDDTCONT , B2BOBCNFRMYN , RIHOLDPRCSISTCD , ISTIBQTY , ISTRETSHIPQTY , ISTDSPSQTY , PRCSISTCONT , HOLDPRCSPCKYN , ICADDYN FROM TWORK_INFO_IB_DT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = COALESCE(#{owkey}, #{sowkey}) AND IBHDKEY = #{ibhdkey}
